summary: Dashboard renders core success state content correctly with estimated bill, usage metrics, and navigation. Brand palette consistency violation present - authenticated UI uses neutral colors instead of diner palette established for public surfaces.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard interface uses generic neutral gray/white palette instead of maintaining brand consistency with public diner palette (teal #9fd8d2, cream #fff8ea, etc.). Creates visual discontinuity after login.
Email verification banner appears to use standard styling rather than established beta banner treatment with heavy weight and tight tracking as defined in component specs.

actions: Apply diner brand palette to authenticated surfaces to maintain visual consistency with public marketing/legal pages
Ensure beta-related UI elements (email verification banner) follow established component styling patterns
Verify dashboard success state functionality meets all screen spec acceptance criteria
